name: conditional-get contract: a 304 skips the downstream pipeline so no diff work is performed
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id gcp --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 200 --etag e1 --body-hash h1 >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id gcp --store-dir "$PWD/s" --simulate-status 304
